videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: Despite working as a comic for over twenty years and teaching stand-up at UCLA for ten, when my mother became depressed, facing an Alzheimer’s diagnosis, I could not make her laugh. videos.title: How I make music for video games | Stephen Barton | TEDxLondonBusinessSchool
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: Stephen Barton revisits a time when video games were dismissed as a waste of time. videos.title: I got fired for saying 'yippee'. Ageism loves silence | Loren Greiff | TEDxSugar Creek Women
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: At 55, Loren Greiff got fired for saying "yippee." But the real story isn't about a single word, it's about the months of silence that came before it. videos.title: Death is a verb: Integrating grief through story | Shari Tate | TEDxSugar Creek Women
videos.author: TEDx Talks
videos.description: Are you working with your grief or is your grief working you? After surviving multiple near-death experiences and enduring a year marked by profound loss, Shari Tate came to a surprising realization: death is not just an event that happens at the end of life.
